---
title: "About"
description: "Production AI engineer. Shipping MCPs + Aufgaard plugin for production AI ops."
pagetitle: "About Temur Khan"
toc: false
---

I ship production-AI ops tools.

The shipped artifacts:

- 7 MCP servers — silentwatch, bash-vet, output-vetter, skill-vetter, cost-tracker, health, upgrade-orchestrator. All MIT, all on PyPI.
- 1 plugin — [Aufgaard](https://github.com/temurkhan13/aufgaard) — bundles all 7 + skills + hooks for Claude Code and Cursor. Submitted to Anthropic and Cursor marketplaces.
- 1 bundle — [Production-AI MCP Suite](https://temurah.gumroad.com/l/production-ai-mcp-suite) — buyer-only field reference, $29.
- 1 Notion template — [AI Production Discipline Framework](https://temurah.gumroad.com/l/ai-production-discipline-framework) — the 14-pattern catalog these MCPs implement, $19.
- 1 free Custom GPT — [AI Production Auditor](https://chatgpt.com/g/g-69f224f4c4c88191bb81e97051dab692-ai-production-auditor) — paste your config, get a 5 Cs audit report.
- Long-form writing — [Writing →](posts.qmd)

The methodology behind the tools comes from cataloging public production-AI incident reports — 200+ threads on HN, Reddit, X over the past year. The patterns are remarkably consistent across stacks (LangChain, LlamaIndex, vanilla SDK, custom agent harnesses), audiences (B2B SaaS, consumer features, internal tools), and scales. The 35-pattern catalog organizes them.

The 7 MCP servers each address one or more patterns from the catalog inline — sub-second, local, free, MCP-native — designed to be called from Claude Code / Cursor / Cline / OpenClaw agents during the conversation, not as separate eval-pipelines.

## What I'm available for

- **Production AI audits** — $2.5–7.5k tiered, 1-4 weeks. Outside-practitioner scoring against the 35-pattern catalog.
- **Custom MCP server builds** — $2k productized adapter / $10–15k custom server / $30–45k full platform. Adapt the templates to your stack — different harness, custom logging schema, vendor billing API, internal compliance.
- **Ops Monitor retainer** — $500–1,500/mo. Ongoing trusted-advisor relationship: quarterly audit + monthly check-in + Slack channel.
- **Advisory** — short-form consulting on production-AI architecture decisions.

[Hire me →](hire.qmd)

## What I'm not

- Not an AI influencer. The tools speak.
- Not a SaaS founder. Audits + custom builds, not subscriptions.
- Not a course creator. The 35-pattern catalog is the methodology; the MCPs implement it.

## Contact

**Email:** [hello@temhan.dev](mailto:hello@temhan.dev) — reply within 2 business days

**Other surfaces:**

- GitHub: [github.com/temurkhan13](https://github.com/temurkhan13)
- X: [@temurkhan138](https://x.com/temurkhan138)
- Gumroad: [temurah.gumroad.com](https://temurah.gumroad.com)
- Notion: [@temurkhan](https://www.notion.so/@temurkhan)

Based in London / Karachi.
